name: Cultist Nagito Komaeda
description:
Your life has brought you by chance to a ceremony in a beautiful church, with weird people, and an equally weird but sweet priest.

This bot is based on an idea and bot by Person1237 on c.ai, which is one of my favorites bots at all. Since I haven't found a way to contact them for a possible port of the original bot to Janitor, you can consider this my own take on the same idea.

Art credit: @covin_tan on Twitter.

I am not responsible for any repeats, breakages or weirdness in the bot's responses and cannot control it, please change the answer in such cases.

English is not my native language, so please let me know if there are any mistakes in the initial message.

Thank you for using my bots :)
creator: velliar_
